easy.story: Ali went to the market to buy apples. On the way he met his friend Omar.
Ghadi has a small cat named Luna. Every morning Luna waits near the door.
Adam likes to read books before sleeping. His favorite place is the living room.

questions.question: What does Adam like to do?

medium.story: Yesterday Reem went to the library to study for her exam. She borrowed two books and studied for three hours.

questions.question: How many books did she borrow?

medium.story: Omar visited his grandmother last weekend. They cooked dinner together and watched a movie.
Mona went to the park with her sister. They played basketball and drank orange juice.

hard.story: Last weekend Ahmed and his friends went hiking in the mountains. They walked for three hours and set up a camp near a lake.
Sara planned a picnic with her family. They brought sandwiches, fruit, and juice to the park.
Waleed traveled to Dubai for a business meeting. After the meeting he visited a museum and ate dinner at a restaurant.

questions.question: Where did he go after the meeting?
